steps.title: Interpret an x-intercept
steps.content: At an $x$-axis intersection, the revenue value is $0$, because the graph has $y=0$ there.

steps.title: Connect it to the variables
steps.content:
Here $x$ represents the unit price and $f(x)$ represents the revenue. So the intercept at $x=a$ means
$$
f(a)=0
$$

steps.title: Match the interpretation
steps.content: Therefore, $a$ represents the unit price that results in a revenue of $0$ dollars. The answer is C.
